name: 3M™ Firestop Identification Label, 3 in x 5 in, (250 Labels/Roll) 4 Rolls/Case
short_description: 3M™ Firestop Identification Labels are bright red labels that stick quickly and reliably to joint and penetration firestop systems in order to provide highly visible information regarding firestop maintenance, repair and inspection.
benefits: Adhesive-backed label provides messaging in firestop systems
For use in penetration or joint firestop systems
Provides clear messaging in fire-rated construction setups
Bright red label provides high visibility
Applies easily and quickly to surfaces

discovery.title: 3M™ Firestop Identification Label, 3 in x 5 in, (250 Labels/Roll) 4 Rolls/Case
